prompt: Use ChatGPT Extended Pro to plan and critique a focused-ultrasound bridge for Braindough, a public Python uv/mise/hk/just monorepo for local in-silico neuroscience experiments using Meta/Facebook TRIBE v2. Heavy models/cache/scratch live under BRAINDOUGH_HOME; CI must use a deterministic fake backend; local TRIBE runs must be bounded. Propose a concrete repo-implementable experiment that does not claim real sonication, acoustic simulation, safety, clinical efficacy, or causal human neuromodulation. Include conceptual framing, stimulus/control conditions, metadata fields, derived tables/metrics/figures, acceptance tests, safety/claim limitations, now-vs-deferred scope, primary-source anchors, and failure modes.

source.capture_method: Browser submitted and captured a ChatGPT Extended Pro planning response; local implementation treats it as advisory and verifies anchors separately.

title: ChatGPT Extended Pro: focused_ultrasound_bridge
